failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: j6LIWZ
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 204, 401, 500
[400] Bad Request:
`{"message":"Bad request: Onboarding steps are not yet complete","request_id":"25206d0b-12aa-4a8c-89cd-3e802ce4ab58"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Cookie: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/v2/onboarding/complete
